title: Amazing Shader Reimagined
description: A clientside performance modpack, featuring pre-tweaked shader and other QoL mods. Perfect for your vanilla dreams.
body:
This is a clientside Modpack that drasticly improves your ingame experience.

What that means:

You get a handtailored server-friendly modpack, that includes a vanilla-ish texturepack and a nice shader.

Together with a small amount of visual and audio enhancing mods, carefully selected to not hurt performance.

And thanks to being a clientside modpack, you can use it everywhere, on any server you want.

 

Main Features:

- A Shader, fine tuned to look great, while being performant.

- Distant Horizons, preconfiguerd with a working shader.

- Pre-mixed Resourcepacks, perfect for a enhanced vanilla-like experience.

- A balanced amount of Visual- and Quality of Life Mods.

- Completly Client-Side, so you can play on your favourite Servers.
